unique factor ID from name and expression.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    import hashlib\n+\n+    return hashlib.md5(f\"{name}_{expr}\".encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\n+\n+def _register_factors_from_experiment(self, experiment) -> list[str]:\n+    \"\"\"\n+    Register all factors from experiment into failure tracker.\n+    Returns list of factor IDs registered.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    factor_ids = []\n+    for task in experiment.sub_tasks:\n+        factor_id = self._generate_factor_id(\n+            task.factor_name, task.factor_expression\n+        )\n+        self._failure_tracker.register_factor(\n+            factor_id=factor_id,\n+            factor_name=task.factor_name,\n+            factor_expression=task.factor_expression,\n+        )\n+        factor_ids.append(factor_id)\n+    self._current_round_factors = factor_ids\n+    logger.info(f\"Registered {len(factor_ids)} factors for tracking\")\n+    return factor_ids\n+\n+def _track_coder_result(self, experiment) -> None:\n+    \"\"\"\n+    Track coder results for all factors in current round.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    for i, task in enumerate(experiment.sub_tasks):\n+        factor_id = self._current_round_factors[i]\n+        workspace = (\n+            experiment.sub_workspace_list[i]\n+            if i < len(experiment.sub_workspace_list)\n+            else None\n+        )\n+        if workspace is not None:\n+            self._failure_tracker.mark_coder_success(factor_id)\n+        else:\n+            self._failure_tracker.mark_coder_failure(\n+                factor_id,\n+                reason=FailureReason.CODER_NO_WORKSPACE,\n+                detail=\"No workspace produced by coder\",\n+            )\n+\n+def _track_backtest_result(self, experiment) -> None:\n+    \"\"\"\n+    Track backtest results for all factors in current round.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    if not hasattr(experiment, \"sub_results\") or not experiment.sub_results:\n+        # No results - mark all as failed\n+        for factor_id in self._current_round_factors:\n+            self._failure_tracker.mark_backtest_failure(\n+                factor_id,\n+                reason=FailureReason.BACKTEST_EMPTY_RESULT,\n+                detail=\"No backtest results produced\",\n+            )\n+        return\n+\n+    # Track results for each factor\n+    for i, task in enumerate(experiment.sub_tasks):\n+        factor_id = self._current_round_factors[i]\n+        factor_name = task.factor_name\n+\n+        if factor_name in experiment.sub_results:\n+            result = experiment.sub_results[factor_name]\n+            self._failure_tracker.mark_backtest_success(factor_id, result=result)\n+        else:\n+            self._failure_tracker.mark_backtest_failure(\n+                factor_id,\n+                reason=FailureReason.BACKTEST_EMPTY_RESULT,\n+                detail=f\"No backtest result for factor {factor_name}\",\n+            )\n+\n+def _finalize_debug_round(self) -> DebugRoundSummary:\n+    \"\"\"\n+    Finalize current debug round and return summary.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    return self._failure_tracker.finalize_round()\n+\n+def get_successful_factor_ids(self) -> list[str]:\n+    \"\"\"Get list of successful factor IDs.\"\"\"\n+    return self._failure_tracker.successful_factor_ids\n+\n+def get_failed_factor_ids(self) -> list[str]:\n+    \"\"\"Get list of failed factor IDs.\"\"\"\n+    return self._failure_tracker.failed_factor_ids\n+\n+def get_factors_for_retry(self) -> list[str]:\n+    \"\"\"Get factors that should be retried in next round.\"\"\"\n+    return self._failure_tracker.get_factors_for_retry()\n+\n+def should_continue_debug(self) -> bool:\n+    \"\"\"Check if debug should continue to next round.\"\"\"\n+    return self._failure_tracker.should_continue_debug()\n+\n def _get_trajectory_data(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n     \"\"\"\n     Get trajectory data for the current round (used by evolution controller).\n     Method name is prefixed with underscore so the workflow system does not treat it as a Hypothesis2Experiment,\n    HypothesisExperiment2Feedback,\n    HypothesisGen,\n    Trace,\n)\nfrom quantaalpha.core.scenario import Scenario\nfrom quantaalpha.core.utils import import_class\nfrom quantaalpha.log import logger\nfrom quantaalpha.log.time import measure_time\nfrom quantaalpha.utils.workflow import LoopBase, LoopMeta\nfrom quantaalpha.core.exception import FactorEmptyError\nfrom quantaalpha.factors.failure_tracker import (\n    FactorFailureTracker,\n    FailureReason,\n    DebugRoundSummary,\n)\nimport threading\n\n\nimport datetime\nimport pickle\nfrom collections import quantaalpha.log import logger\nfrom functools import wraps\n\n# Decorator: check stop_event before invoking the function\n\n\ndef stop_event_check(func):\n    @wraps(func)\n    def wrapper(self, *args, **kwargs):\n        if STOP_EVENT is not None and STOP_EVENT.is_set():\n            raise Exception(\"Operation stopped due to stop_event flag.\")\n        return func(self, *args, **kwargs)\n\n    return wrapper\n\n\nclass AlphaAgentLoop(LoopBase, metaclass=LoopMeta):\n    skip_loop_error = (FactorEmptyError,)\n\n    @measure_time\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        PROP_SETTING: BaseFacSetting,\n        potential_direction,\n        stop_event: threading.Event,\n        use_local: bool = True,\n        strategy_suffix: str = \"\",\n        evolution_phase: str = \"original\",\n        trajectory_id: str = \"\",\n        parent_trajectory_ids: list = None,\n        direction_id: int = 0,\n        round_idx: int = 0,\n        quality_gate_config: dict = None,\n    ):\n        with logger.tag(\"init\"):\n            self.use_local = use_local\n            # Store initial direction for factor provenance\n            self.potential_direction = potential_direction\n\n            # Evolution-related attributes\n            self.strategy_suffix = strategy_suffix\n            self.evolution_phase = evolution_phase  # original / mutation / crossover\n            self.trajectory_id = trajectory_id\n            self.parent_trajectory_ids = parent_trajectory_ids or []\n            self.direction_id = direction_id\n            self.round_idx = round_idx  # 0=original, 1=mutation, 2=crossover, ...\n\n            # Quality gate config\n            self.quality_gate_config = quality_gate_config or {}\n\n            # For trajectory collection\n            self._last_hypothesis = None\n            self._last_experiment = None\n            self._last_feedback = None\n\n            # Failure tracking for debug rounds\n            self._failure_tracker = FactorFailureTracker(\n                max_debug_rounds=10\n            )  # Default 10 rounds\n            self._current_round_factors = []\n\n            logger.info(\n                f\"Initialized AlphaAgentLoop, backtest in {'local' if use_local else 'Docker'}\"\n            )\n            if potential_direction:\n                logger.info(f\"Initial direction: {potential_direction}\")\n            if evolution_phase != \"original\":\n                logger.info(\n                    f\"Evolution phase: {evolution_phase}, round: {round_idx}, trajectory_id: {trajectory_id}\"\n                )\n\n            consistency_enabled = self.quality_gate_config.get(\n                \"consistency_enabled\", False\n            )\n            complexity_enabled = self.quality_gate_config.get(\n                \"complexity_enabled\", True\n            )\n            redundancy_enabled = self.quality_gate_config.get(\n                \"redundancy_enabled\", True\n            )\n            logger.info(\n                f\"Quality gate: consistency={'on' if consistency_enabled else 'off'}, \"\n                f\"complexity={'on' if complexity_enabled else 'off'}, \"\n                f\"redundancy={'on' if redundancy_enabled else 'off'}\"\n            )\n\n            scen: Scenario = import_class(PROP_SETTING.scen)(use_local=use_local)\n            logger.log_object(scen, tag=\"scenario\")\n\n            # If strategy suffix is set, append it to the direction\n            effective_direction = potential_direction\n            if strategy_suffix:\n                effective_direction = (\n                    (potential_direction or \"\") + \"\\n\" + strategy_suffix\n                )\n\n            self.hypothesis_generator: HypothesisGen = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.hypothesis_gen\n            )(scen, effective_direction)\n            logger.log_object(self.hypothesis_generator, tag=\"hypothesis generator\")\n\n            # Pass consistency check config into factor constructor\n            self.factor_constructor: Hypothesis2Experiment = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.hypothesis2experiment\n            )(consistency_enabled=consistency_enabled)\n            logger.log_object(self.factor_constructor, tag=\"experiment generation\")\n\n            self.coder: Developer = import_class(PROP_SETTING.coder)(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.coder, tag=\"coder\")\n\n            self.runner: Developer = import_class(PROP_SETTING.runner)(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.runner, tag=\"runner\")\n\n            self.summarizer: HypothesisExperiment2Feedback = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.summarizer\n            )(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.summarizer, tag=\"summarizer\")\n            self.trace = Trace(scen=scen)\n\n            global STOP_EVENT\n            STOP_EVENT = stop_event\n            super().__init__()\n\n    @classmethod\n    def load(cls, path, use_local: bool = True):\n        \"\"\"Load existing session.\"\"\"\n        instance = super().load(path)\n        instance.use_local = use_local\n        logger.info(\n            f\"Loaded AlphaAgentLoop, backtest in {'local' if use_local else 'Docker'}\"\n        )\n        return instance\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def factor_propose(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Propose hypothesis as the basis for factor construction.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            idea = self.hypothesis_generator.gen(self.trace)\n            logger.log_object(idea, tag=\"hypothesis generation\")\n            self._last_hypothesis = idea\n        return idea\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def factor_construct(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Construct multiple factors from the hypothesis.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            factor = self.factor_constructor.convert(\n                prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], self.trace\n            )\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_tasks, tag=\"experiment generation\")\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def factor_calculate(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Compute factor values from factor expressions.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"d\"):  # develop\n            factor = self.coder.develop(prev_out[\"factor_construct\"])\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_workspace_list, tag=\"coder result\")\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def factor_backtest(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Run backtest for factors.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"ef\"):  # evaluate and feedback\n            logger.info(f\"Start factor backtest (Local: {self.use_local})\")\n            exp = self.runner.develop(\n                prev_out[\"factor_calculate\"], use_local=self.use_local\n            )\n            if exp is None:\n                logger.error(f\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n                raise FactorEmptyError(\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n            logger.log_object(exp, tag=\"runner result\")\n            self._last_experiment = exp\n        return exp\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def feedback(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        feedback = self.summarizer.generate_feedback(\n            prev_out[\"factor_backtest\"], prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], self.trace\n        )\n        with logger.tag(\"ef\"):  # evaluate and feedback\n            logger.log_object(feedback, tag=\"feedback\")\n        self.trace.hist.append(\n            (prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], prev_out[\"factor_backtest\"], feedback)\n        )\n\n        self._last_feedback = feedback\n\n        # Auto-save factors to unified factor library\n        try:\n            import os\n            from pathlib import Path\n            from quantaalpha.factors.library import FactorLibraryManager\n\n            # Project root: loop.py -> pipeline/ -> quantaalpha/ -> project_root/\n            project_root = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent\n\n            experiment_id = \"unknown\"\n            if hasattr(self, \"session_folder\") and self.session_folder:\n                parts = Path(self.session_folder).parts\n                for part in parts:\n                    if part.startswith(\"202\") and len(part) > 10:\n                        experiment_id = part\n                        break\n\n            round_number = self.round_idx\n\n            hypothesis_text = None\n            if prev_out.get(\"factor_propose\"):\n                hypothesis_text = str(prev_out[\"factor_propose\"])\n\n            planning_direction = getattr(self, \"potential_direction\", None)\n            user_initial_direction = getattr(self, \"user_initial_direction\", None)\n\n            evolution_phase = getattr(self, \"evolution_phase\", \"original\")\n            trajectory_id = getattr(self, \"trajectory_id\", \"\")\n            parent_trajectory_ids = getattr(self, \"parent_trajectory_ids\", [])\n\n            # Factor library filename can be customized via env FACTOR_LIBRARY_SUFFIX\n            library_suffix = os.environ.get(\"FACTOR_LIBRARY_SUFFIX\", \"\")\n            if library_suffix:\n                library_filename = f\"all_factors_library_{library_suffix}.json\"\n            else:\n                library_filename = \"all_factors_library.json\"\n            factorlib_dir = project_root / \"data\" / \"factorlib\"\n            factorlib_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n            library_path = factorlib_dir / library_filename\n            manager = FactorLibraryManager(str(library_path))\n            manager.add_factors_from_experiment(\n                experiment=prev_out[\"factor_backtest\"],\n                experiment_id=experiment_id,\n                round_number=round_number,\n                hypothesis=hypothesis_text,\n                feedback=feedback,\n                initial_direction=planning_direction,\n                user_initial_direction=user_initial_direction,\n                planning_direction=planning_direction,\n                evolution_phase=evolution_phase,\n                trajectory_id=trajectory_id,\n                parent_trajectory_ids=parent_trajectory_ids,\n            )\n            logger.info(\n                f\"Saved factors to library: {library_path} (phase={evolution_phase})\"\n            )\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.warning(f\"Failed to save factors to library: {e}\")\n\n    def _get_trajectory_data(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Get trajectory data for the current round (used by evolution controller).\n        Method name is prefixed with underscore so the workflow system does not treat it as a step.\n        Returns:\n            Dict with hypothesis, experiment, feedback, etc.\n        \"\"\"\n        return {\n            \"hypothesis\": self._last_hypothesis,\n            \"experiment\": self._last_experiment,\n            \"feedback\": self._last_feedback,\n            \"direction_id\": self.direction_id,\n            \"evolution_phase\": self.evolution_phase,\n            \"trajectory_id\": self.trajectory_id,\n            \"parent_trajectory_ids\": self.parent_trajectory_ids,\n            \"loop_idx\": self.loop_idx,\n            \"round_idx\": self.round_idx,\n        }\n\n\nclass BacktestLoop(LoopBase, metaclass=LoopMeta):\n    skip_loop_error = (FactorEmptyError,)\n\n    @measure_time\n    def __init__(self, PROP_SETTING: BaseFacSetting, factor_path=None):\n        with logger.tag(\"init\"):\n            self.factor_path = factor_path\n\n            scen: Scenario = import_class(PROP_SETTING.scen)()\n            logger.log_object(scen, tag=\"scenario\")\n\n            self.hypothesis_generator: HypothesisGen = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.hypothesis_gen\n            )(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.hypothesis_generator, tag=\"hypothesis generator\")\n\n            self.factor_constructor: Hypothesis2Experiment = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.hypothesis2experiment\n            )(factor_path=factor_path)\n            logger.log_object(self.factor_constructor, tag=\"experiment generation\")\n\n            self.coder: Developer = import_class(PROP_SETTING.coder)(\n                scen,\n                with_feedback=False,\n                with_knowledge=False,\n                knowledge_self_gen=False,\n            )\n            logger.log_object(self.coder, tag=\"coder\")\n\n            self.runner: Developer = import_class(PROP_SETTING.runner)(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.runner, tag=\"runner\")\n\n            self.summarizer: HypothesisExperiment2Feedback = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.summarizer\n            )(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.summarizer, tag=\"summarizer\")\n            self.trace = Trace(scen=scen)\n            super().__init__()\n\n    def factor_propose(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Market hypothesis on which factors are built\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            idea = self.hypothesis_generator.gen(self.trace)\n            logger.log_object(idea, tag=\"hypothesis generation\")\n        return idea\n\n    @measure_time\n    def factor_construct(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Construct a variety of factors that depend on the hypothesis\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            factor = self.factor_constructor.convert(\n                prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], self.trace\n            )\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_tasks, tag=\"experiment generation\")\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    def factor_calculate(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Debug factors and calculate their values\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"d\"):  # develop\n            factor = self.coder.develop(prev_out[\"factor_construct\"])\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_workspace_list, tag=\"coder result\")\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    def factor_backtest(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Conduct Backtesting\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"ef\"):  # evaluate and feedback\n            exp = self.runner.develop(prev_out[\"factor_calculate\"])\n            if exp is None:\n                logger.error(f\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n                raise FactorEmptyError(\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n            logger.log_object(exp, tag=\"runner result\")\n        return exp\n\n    @measure_time\n    def stop(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        exit(0)\n","after":"\"\"\"\nModel workflow with session control.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport time\nimport pandas as pd\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom quantaalpha.pipeline.settings import BaseFacSetting\nfrom @stop_event_check\n    def factor_propose(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Propose hypothesis as the basis for factor construction.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            idea = self.hypothesis_generator.gen(self.trace)\n            logger.log_object(idea, tag=\"hypothesis generation\")\n            self._last_hypothesis = idea\n        return idea\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def factor_construct(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Construct multiple factors from the hypothesis.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            factor = self.factor_constructor.convert(\n                prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], self.trace\n            )\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_tasks, tag=\"experiment generation\")\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def factor_calculate(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Compute factor values from factor expressions.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"d\"):  # develop\n            factor = self.coder.develop(prev_out[\"factor_construct\"])\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_workspace_list, tag=\"coder result\")\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def factor_backtest(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Run backtest for factors.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"ef\"):  # evaluate and feedback\n            logger.info(f\"Start factor backtest (Local: {self.use_local})\")\n            exp = self.runner.develop(\n                prev_out[\"factor_calculate\"], use_local=self.use_local\n            )\n            if exp is None:\n                logger.error(f\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n                raise FactorEmptyError(\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n            logger.log_object(exp, tag=\"runner result\")\n            self._last_experiment = exp\n        return exp\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def feedback(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        feedback = self.summarizer.generate_feedback(\n            prev_out[\"factor_backtest\"], prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], self.trace\n        )\n        with logger.tag(\"ef\"):  # evaluate and feedback\n            logger.log_object(feedback, tag=\"feedback\")\n        self.trace.hist.append(\n            (prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], prev_out[\"factor_backtest\"], feedback)\n        )\n\n        self._last_feedback = feedback\n\n        # Auto-save factors to unified factor library\n        try:\n            import os\n            from pathlib import Path\n            from quantaalpha.factors.library import FactorLibraryManager\n\n            # Project root: loop.py -> pipeline/ -> quantaalpha/ -> project_root/\n            project_root = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent\n\n            experiment_id = \"unknown\"\n            if hasattr(self, \"session_folder\") and self.session_folder:\n                parts = Path(self.session_folder).parts\n                for part in parts:\n                    if part.startswith(\"202\") and len(part) > 10:\n                        experiment_id = part\n                        break\n\n            round_number = self.round_idx\n\n            hypothesis_text = None\n            if prev_out.get(\"factor_propose\"):\n                hypothesis_text = str(prev_out[\"factor_propose\"])\n\n            planning_direction = getattr(self, \"potential_direction\", None)\n            user_initial_direction = getattr(self, \"user_initial_direction\", None)\n\n            evolution_phase = getattr(self, \"evolution_phase\", \"original\")\n            trajectory_id = getattr(self, \"trajectory_id\", \"\")\n            parent_trajectory_ids = getattr(self, \"parent_trajectory_ids\", [])\n\n            # Factor library filename can be customized via env FACTOR_LIBRARY_SUFFIX\n            library_suffix = os.environ.get(\"FACTOR_LIBRARY_SUFFIX\", \"\")\n            if library_suffix:\n                library_filename = f\"all_factors_library_{library_suffix}.json\"\n            else:\n                library_filename = \"all_factors_library.json\"\n            factorlib_dir = project_root / \"data\" / \"factorlib\"\n            factorlib_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n            library_path = factorlib_dir / library_filename\n            manager = FactorLibraryManager(str(library_path))\n            manager.add_factors_from_experiment(\n                experiment=prev_out[\"factor_backtest\"],\n                experiment_id=experiment_id,\n                round_number=round_number,\n                hypothesis=hypothesis_text,\n                feedback=feedback,\n                initial_direction=planning_direction,\n                user_initial_direction=user_initial_direction,\n                planning_direction=planning_direction,\n                evolution_phase=evolution_phase,\n                trajectory_id=trajectory_id,\n                parent_trajectory_ids=parent_trajectory_ids,\n            )\n            logger.info(\n                f\"Saved factors to library: {library_path} (phase={evolution_phase})\"\n            )\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.warning(f\"Failed to save factors to library: {e}\")\n\n    def _generate_factor_id(self, name: str, expr: str) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Generate a unique factor ID from name and expression.\n        \"\"\"\n        import hashlib\n\n        return hashlib.md5(f\"{name}_{expr}\".encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\n\n    def _register_factors_from_experiment(self, experiment) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Register all factors from experiment into failure tracker.\n        Returns list of factor IDs registered.\n        \"\"\"\n        factor_ids = []\n        for task in experiment.sub_tasks:\n            factor_id = self._generate_factor_id(\n                task.factor_name, task.factor_expression\n            )\n            self._failure_tracker.register_factor(\n                factor_id=factor_id,\n                factor_name=task.factor_name,\n                factor_expression=task.factor_expression,\n            )\n            factor_ids.append(factor_id)\n        self._current_round_factors = factor_ids\n        logger.info(f\"Registered {len(factor_ids)} factors for tracking\")\n        return factor_ids\n\n    def _track_coder_result(self, experiment) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Track coder results for all factors in current round.\n        \"\"\"\n        for i, task in enumerate(experiment.sub_tasks):\n            factor_id = self._current_round_factors[i]\n            workspace = (\n                experiment.sub_workspace_list[i]\n                if i < len(experiment.sub_workspace_list)\n                else None\n            )\n            if workspace is not None:\n                self._failure_tracker.mark_coder_success(factor_id)\n            else:\n                self._failure_tracker.mark_coder_failure(\n                    factor_id,\n                    reason=FailureReason.CODER_NO_WORKSPACE,\n                    detail=\"No workspace produced by coder\",\n                )\n\n    def _track_backtest_result(self, experiment) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Track backtest results for all factors in current round.\n        \"\"\"\n        if not hasattr(experiment, \"sub_results\") or not experiment.sub_results:\n            # No results - mark all as failed\n            for factor_id in self._current_round_factors:\n                self._failure_tracker.mark_backtest_failure(\n                    factor_id,\n                    reason=FailureReason.BACKTEST_EMPTY_RESULT,\n                    detail=\"No backtest results produced\",\n                )\n            return\n\n        # Track results for each factor\n        for i, task in enumerate(experiment.sub_tasks):\n            factor_id = self._current_round_factors[i]\n            factor_name = task.factor_name\n\n            if factor_name in experiment.sub_results:\n                result = experiment.sub_results[factor_name]\n                self._failure_tracker.mark_backtest_success(factor_id, result=result)\n            else:\n                self._failure_tracker.mark_backtest_failure(\n                    factor_id,\n                    reason=FailureReason.BACKTEST_EMPTY_RESULT,\n                    detail=f\"No backtest result for factor {factor_name}\",\n                )\n\n    def _finalize_debug_round(self) -> DebugRoundSummary:\n        \"\"\"\n        Finalize current debug round and return summary.\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._failure_tracker.finalize_round()\n\n    def get_successful_factor_ids(self) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"Get list of successful factor IDs.\"\"\"\n        return self._failure_tracker.successful_factor_ids\n\n    def get_failed_factor_ids(self) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"Get list of failed factor IDs.\"\"\"\n        return self._failure_tracker.failed_factor_ids\n\n    def get_factors_for_retry(self) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"Get factors that should be retried in next round.\"\"\"\n        return self._failure_tracker.get_factors_for_retry()\n\n    def should_continue_debug(self) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Check if debug should continue to next round.\"\"\"\n        return self._failure_tracker.should_continue_debug()\n\n    def _get_trajectory_data(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Get trajectory data for the current round (used by evolution controller).\n        Method name is prefixed with underscore so the workflow system does not treat it as a step.\n        Returns:\n            Dict with hypothesis, experiment, feedback, etc.\n        \"\"\"\n        return {\n            \"hypothesis\": self._last_hypothesis,\n            \"experiment\": self._last_experiment,\n            \"feedback\": self._last_feedback,\n            \"direction_id\": self.direction_id,\n            \"evolution_phase\": self.evolution_phase,\n            \"trajectory_id\": self.trajectory_id,\n            \"parent_trajectory_ids\": self.parent_trajectory_ids,\n            \"loop_idx\": self.loop_idx,\n            \"round_idx\": self.round_idx,\n        }\n\n\nclass BacktestLoop(LoopBase, metaclass=LoopMeta):\n    skip_loop_error = (FactorEmptyError,)\n\n    @measure_time\n    def __init__(self, PROP_SETTING: BaseFacSetting, factor_path=None):\n        with logger.tag(\"init\"):\n            self.factor_path = factor_path\n\n            scen: Scenario = import_class(PROP_SETTING.scen)()\n            logger.log_object(scen, tag=\"scenario\")\n\n            self.hypothesis_generator: HypothesisGen = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.hypothesis_gen\n            )(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.hypothesis_generator, tag=\"hypothesis generator\")\n\n            self.factor_constructor: Hypothesis2Experiment = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.hypothesis2experiment\n            )(factor_path=factor_path)\n            logger.log_object(self.factor_constructor, tag=\"experiment generation\")\n\n            self.coder: Developer = import_class(PROP_SETTING.coder)(\n                scen,\n                with_feedback=False,\n                with_knowledge=False,\n                knowledge_self_gen=False,\n            )\n            logger.log_object(self.coder, tag=\"coder\")\n\n            self.runner: Developer = import_class(PROP_SETTING.runner)(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.runner, tag=\"runner\")\n\n            self.summarizer: HypothesisExperiment2Feedback = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.summarizer\n            )(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.summarizer, tag=\"summarizer\")\n            self.trace = Trace(scen=scen)\n            super().__init__()\n\n    def factor_propose(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Market hypothesis on which factors are built\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            idea = self.hypothesis_generator.gen(self.trace)\n            logger.log_object(idea, tag=\"hypothesis generation\")\n        return idea\n\n    @measure_time\n    def factor_construct(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Construct a variety of factors that depend on the hypothesis\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            factor = self.factor_constructor.convert(\n                prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], self.trace\n            )\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_tasks, tag=\"experiment generation\")\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    def factor_calculate(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Debug factors and calculate their values\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"d\"):  # develop\n            factor = self.coder.develop(prev_out[\"factor_construct\"])\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_workspace_list, tag=\"coder result\")\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    def factor_backtest(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Conduct Backtesting\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"ef\"):  # evaluate and feedback\n            exp = self.runner.develop(prev_out[\"factor_calculate\"])\n            if exp is None:\n                logger.error(f\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n                raise FactorEmptyError(\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n            logger.log_object(exp, tag=\"runner result\")\n        return exp\n\n    @measure_time\n    def stop(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n quantaalpha.core.exception import CoderError\nfrom quantaalpha.log import logger\nfrom functools import wraps\n\n# Decorator: check stop_event before invoking the function\n\n\ndef stop_event_check(func):\n    @wraps(func)\n    def wrapper(self, *args, **kwargs):\n        if STOP_EVENT is not None and STOP_EVENT.is_set():\n            raise Exception(\"Operation stopped due to stop_event flag.\")\n        return func(self, *args, **kwargs)\n\n    return wrapper\n\n\nclass AlphaAgentLoop(LoopBase, metaclass=LoopMeta):\n    skip_loop_error = (FactorEmptyError,)\n\n    @measure_time\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        PROP_SETTING: BaseFacSetting,\n        potential_direction,\n        stop_event: threading.Event,\n        use_local: bool = True,\n        strategy_suffix: str = \"\",\n        evolution_phase: str = \"original\",\n        trajectory_id: str = \"\",\n        parent_trajectory_ids: list = None,\n        direction_id: int = 0,\n        round_idx: int = 0,\n        quality_gate_config: dict = None,\n    ):\n        with logger.tag(\"init\"):\n            self.use_local = use_local\n            # Store initial direction for factor provenance\n            self.potential_direction = potential_direction\n\n            # Evolution-related attributes\n            self.strategy_suffix = strategy_suffix\n            self.evolution_phase = evolution_phase  # original / mutation / crossover\n            self.trajectory_id = trajectory_id\n            self.parent_trajectory_ids = parent_trajectory_ids or []\n            self.direction_id = direction_id\n            self.round_idx = round_idx  # 0=original, 1=mutation, 2=crossover, ...\n\n            # Quality gate config\n            self.quality_gate_config = quality_gate_config or {}\n\n            # For trajectory collection\n            self._last_hypothesis = None\n            self._last_experiment = None\n            self._last_feedback = None\n\n            # Failure tracking for debug rounds\n            self._failure_tracker = FactorFailureTracker(\n                max_debug_rounds=10\n            )  # Default 10 rounds\n            self._current_round_factors = []\n\n            logger.info(\n                f\"Initialized AlphaAgentLoop, backtest in {'local' if use_local else 'Docker'}\"\n            )\n            if potential_direction:\n                logger.info(f\"Initial direction: {potential_direction}\")\n            if evolution_phase != \"original\":\n                logger.info(\n                    f\"Evolution phase: {evolution_phase}, round: {round_idx}, trajectory_id: {trajectory_id}\"\n                )\n\n            consistency_enabled = self.quality_gate_config.get(\n                \"consistency_enabled\", False\n            )\n            complexity_enabled = self.quality_gate_config.get(\n                \"complexity_enabled\", True\n            )\n            redundancy_enabled = self.quality_gate_config.get(\n                \"redundancy_enabled\", True\n            )\n            logger.info(\n                f\"Quality gate: consistency={'on' if consistency_enabled else 'off'}, \"\n                f\"complexity={'on' if complexity_enabled else 'off'}, \"\n                f\"redundancy={'on' if redundancy_enabled else 'off'}\"\n            )\n\n            scen: Scenario = import_class(PROP_SETTING.scen)(use_local=use_local)\n            logger.log_object(scen, tag=\"scenario\")\n\n            # If strategy suffix is set, append it to the direction\n            effective_direction = potential_direction\n            if strategy_suffix:\n                effective_direction = (\n                    (potential_direction or \"\") + \"\\n\" + strategy_suffix\n                )\n\n            self.hypothesis_generator: HypothesisGen = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.hypothesis_gen\n            )(scen, effective_direction)\n            logger.log_object(self.hypothesis_generator, tag=\"hypothesis generator\")\n\n            # Pass consistency check config into factor constructor\n            self.factor_constructor: Hypothesis2Experiment = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.hypothesis2experiment\n            )(consistency_enabled=consistency_enabled)\n            logger.log_object(self.factor_constructor, tag=\"experiment generation\")\n\n            self.coder: Developer = import_class(PROP_SETTING.coder)(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.coder, tag=\"coder\")\n\n            self.runner: Developer = import_class(PROP_SETTING.runner)(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.runner, tag=\"runner\")\n\n            self.summarizer: HypothesisExperiment2Feedback = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.summarizer\n            )(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.summarizer, tag=\"summarizer\")\n            self.trace = Trace(scen=scen)\n\n            global STOP_EVENT\n            STOP_EVENT = stop_event\n            super().__init__()\n\n    @classmethod\n    def load(cls, path, use_local: bool = True):\n        \"\"\"Load existing session.\"\"\"\n        instance = super().load(path)\n        instance.use_local = use_local\n        logger.info(\n            f\"Loaded AlphaAgentLoop, backtest in {'local' if use_local else 'Docker'}\"\n        )\n        return instance\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def factor_propose(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Propose hypothesis as the basis for factor construction.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            idea = self.hypothesis_generator.gen(self.trace)\n            logger.log_object(idea, tag=\"hypothesis generation\")\n            self._last_hypothesis = idea\n        return idea\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def factor_construct(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Construct multiple factors from the hypothesis.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            factor = self.factor_constructor.convert(\n                prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], self.trace\n            )\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_tasks, tag=\"experiment generation\")\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def factor_calculate(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Compute factor values from factor expressions.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"d\"):  # develop\n            factor = self.coder.develop(prev_out[\"factor_construct\"])\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_workspace_list, tag=\"coder result\")\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def factor_backtest(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Run backtest for factors.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"ef\"):  # evaluate and feedback\n            logger.info(f\"Start factor backtest (Local: {self.use_local})\")\n            exp = self.runner.develop(\n                prev_out[\"factor_calculate\"], use_local=self.use_local\n            )\n            if exp is None:\n                logger.error(f\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n                raise FactorEmptyError(\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n            logger.log_object(exp, tag=\"runner result\")\n            self._last_experiment = exp\n        return exp\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def feedback(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        feedback = self.summarizer.generate_feedback(\n            prev_out[\"factor_backtest\"], prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], self.trace\n        )\n        with logger.tag(\"ef\"):  # evaluate and feedback\n            logger.log_object(feedback, tag=\"feedback\")\n        self.trace.hist.append(\n            (prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], prev_out[\"factor_backtest\"], feedback)\n        )\n\n        self._last_feedback = feedback\n\n        # Auto-save factors to unified factor library\n        try:\n            import os\n            from pathlib import Path\n            from quantaalpha.factors.library import FactorLibraryManager\n\n            # Project root: loop.py -> pipeline/ -> quantaalpha/ -> project_root/\n            project_root = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent\n\n            experiment_id = \"unknown\"\n            if hasattr(self, \"session_folder\") and self.session_folder:\n                parts = Path(self.session_folder).parts\n                for part in parts:\n                    if part.startswith(\"202\") and len(part) > 10:\n                        experiment_id = part\n                        break\n\n            round_number = self.round_idx\n\n            hypothesis_text = None\n            if prev_out.get(\"factor_propose\"):\n                hypothesis_text = str(prev_out[\"factor_propose\"])\n\n            planning_direction = getattr(self, \"potential_direction\", None)\n            user_initial_direction = getattr(self, \"user_initial_direction\", None)\n\n            evolution_phase = getattr(self, \"evolution_phase\", \"original\")\n            trajectory_id = getattr(self, \"trajectory_id\", \"\")\n            parent_trajectory_ids = getattr(self, \"parent_trajectory_ids\", [])\n\n            # Factor library filename can be customized via env FACTOR_LIBRARY_SUFFIX\n            library_suffix = os.environ.get(\"FACTOR_LIBRARY_SUFFIX\", \"\")\n            if library_suffix:\n                library_filename = f\"all_factors_library_{library_suffix}.json\"\n            else:\n                library_filename = \"all_factors_library.json\"\n            factorlib_dir = project_root / \"data\" / \"factorlib\"\n            factorlib_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n            library_path = factorlib_dir / library_filename\n            manager = FactorLibraryManager(str(library_path))\n            manager.add_factors_from_experiment(\n                experiment=prev_out[\"factor_backtest\"],\n                experiment_id=experiment_id,\n                round_number=round_number,\n                hypothesis=hypothesis_text,\n                feedback=feedback,\n                initial_direction=planning_direction,\n                user_initial_direction=user_initial_direction,\n                planning_direction=planning_direction,\n                evolution_phase=evolution_phase,\n                trajectory_id=trajectory_id,\n                parent_trajectory_ids=parent_trajectory_ids,\n            )\n            logger.info(\n                f\"Saved factors to library: {library_path} (phase={evolution_phase})\"\n            )\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.warning(f\"Failed to save factors to library: {e}\")\n\n    def _generate_factor_id(self, name: str, expr: str) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Generate a unique factor ID from name and expression.\n        \"\"\"\n        import hashlib\n\n        return hashlib.md5(f\"{name}_{expr}\".encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\n\n    def _register_factors_from_experiment(self, experiment) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Register all factors from experiment into failure tracker.\n        Returns list of factor IDs registered.\n        \"\"\"\n        factor_ids = []\n        for task in experiment.sub_tasks:\n            factor_id = self._generate_factor_id(\n                task.factor_name, task.factor_expression\n            )\n            self._failure_tracker.register_factor(\n                factor_id=factor_id,\n                factor_name=task.factor_name,\n                factor_expression=task.factor_expression,\n            )\n            factor_ids.append(factor_id)\n        self._current_round_factors = factor_ids\n        logger.info(f\"Registered {len(factor_ids)} factors for tracking\")\n        return factor_ids\n\n    def _track_coder_result(self, experiment) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Track coder results for all factors in current round.\n        \"\"\"\n        for i, task in enumerate(experiment.sub_tasks):\n            factor_id = self._current_round_factors[i]\n            workspace = (\n                experiment.sub_workspace_list[i]\n                if i < len(experiment.sub_workspace_list)\n                else None\n            )\n            if workspace is not None:\n                self._failure_tracker.mark_coder_success(factor_id)\n            else:\n                self._failure_tracker.mark_coder_failure(\n                    factor_id,\n                    reason=FailureReason.CODER_NO_WORKSPACE,\n                    detail=\"No workspace produced by coder\",\n                )\n\n    def _track_backtest_result(self, experiment) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Track backtest results for all factors in current round.\n        \"\"\"\n        if not hasattr(experiment, \"sub_results\") or not experiment.sub_results:\n            # No results - mark all as failed\n            for factor_id in self._current_round_factors:\n                self._failure_tracker.mark_backtest_failure(\n                    factor_id,\n                    reason=FailureReason.BACKTEST_EMPTY_RESULT,\n                    detail=\"No backtest results produced\",\n                )\n            return\n\n        # Track results for each factor\n        for i, task in enumerate(experiment.sub_tasks):\n            factor_id = self._current_round_factors[i]\n            factor_name = task.factor_name\n\n            if factor_name in experiment.sub_results:\n                result = experiment.sub_results[factor_name]\n                self._failure_tracker.mark_backtest_success(factor_id, result=result)\n            else:\n                self._failure_tracker.mark_backtest_failure(\n                    factor_id,\n                    reason=FailureReason.BACKTEST_EMPTY_RESULT,\n                    detail=f\"No backtest result for factor {factor_name}\",\n                )\n\n    def _finalize_debug_round(self) -> DebugRoundSummary:\n        \"\"\"\n        Finalize current debug round and return summary.\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._failure_tracker.finalize_round()\n\n    def get_successful_factor_ids(self) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"Get list of successful factor IDs.\"\"\"\n        return self._failure_tracker.successful_factor_ids\n\n    def get_failed_factor_ids(self) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"Get list of failed factor IDs.\"\"\"\n        return self._failure_tracker.failed_factor_ids\n\n    def get_factors_for_retry(self) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"Get factors that should be retried in next round.\"\"\"\n        return self._failure_tracker.get_factors_for_retry()\n\n    def should_continue_debug(self) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Check if debug should continue to next round.\"\"\"\n        return self._failure_tracker.should_continue_debug()\n\n    def _get_trajectory_data(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Get trajectory data for the current round (used by evolution controller).\n        Method name is prefixed with underscore so the workflow system does not treat it as a step.\n        Returns:\n            Dict with hypothesis, experiment, feedback, etc.\n        \"\"\"\n        return {\n            \"hypothesis\": self._last_hypothesis,\n            \"experiment\": self._last_experiment,\n            \"feedback\": self._last_feedback,\n            \"direction_id\": self.direction_id,\n            \"evolution_phase\": self.evolution_phase,\n            \"trajectory_id\": self.trajectory_id,\n            \"parent_trajectory_ids\": self.parent_trajectory_ids,\n            \"loop_idx\": self.loop_idx,\n            \"round_idx\": self.round_idx,\n        }\n\n\nclass BacktestLoop(LoopBase, metaclass=LoopMeta):\n    skip_loop_error = (FactorEmptyError,)\n\n    @measure_time\n    def __init__(self, PROP_SETTING: BaseFacSetting, factor_path=None):\n        with logger.tag(\"init\"):\n            self.factor_path = factor_path\n\n            scen: Scenario = import_class(PROP_SETTING.scen)()\n            logger.log_object(scen, tag=\"scenario\")\n\n            self.hypothesis_generator: HypothesisGen = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.hypothesis_gen\n            )(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.hypothesis_generator, tag=\"hypothesis generator\")\n\n            self.factor_constructor: Hypothesis2Experiment = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.hypothesis2experiment\n            )(factor_path=factor_path)\n            logger.log_object(self.factor_constructor, tag=\"experiment generation\")\n\n            self.coder: Developer = import_class(PROP_SETTING.coder)(\n                scen,\n                with_feedback=False,\n                with_knowledge=False,\n                knowledge_self_gen=False,\n            )\n            logger.log_object(self.coder, tag=\"coder\")\n\n            self.runner: Developer = import_class(PROP_SETTING.runner)(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.runner, tag=\"runner\")\n\n            self.summarizer: HypothesisExperiment2Feedback = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.summarizer\n            )(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.summarizer, tag=\"summarizer\")\n            self.trace = Trace(scen=scen)\n            super().__init__()\n\n    def factor_propose(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Market hypothesis on which factors are built\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            idea = self.hypothesis_generator.gen(self.trace)\n            logger.log_object(idea, tag=\"hypothesis generation\")\n        return idea\n\n    @measure_time\n    def factor_construct(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Construct a variety of factors that depend on the hypothesis\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            factor = self.factor_constructor.convert(\n                prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], self.trace\n            )\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_tasks, tag=\"experiment generation\")\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    def factor_calculate(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Debug factors and calculate their values\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"d\"):  # develop\n            factor = self.coder.develop(prev_out[\"factor_construct\"])\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_workspace_list, tag=\"coder result\")\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    def factor_backtest(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Conduct Backtesting\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"ef\"):  # evaluate and feedback\n            exp = self.runner.develop(prev_out[\"factor_calculate\"])\n            if exp is None:\n                logger.error(f\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n                raise FactorEmptyError(\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n            logger.log_object(exp, tag=\"runner result\")\n        return exp\n\n    @measure_time\n    def stop(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        exit(0)\n","after":"\"\"\"\nModel workflow with session control.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport time\nimport pandas as pd\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom quantaalpha.pipeline.settings import BaseFacSetting\nfrom quantaalpha.core.developer import Developer\nfrom quantaalpha.core.proposal import (\n    Hypothesis2Experiment,\n    HypothesisExperiment2Feedback,\n    HypothesisGen,\n    Trace,\n)\nfrom quantaalpha.core.scenario import Scenario\nfrom quantaalpha.core.utils import import_class\nfrom quantaalpha.log import logger\nfrom quantaalpha.log.time import measure_time\nfrom quantaalpha.utils.workflow import LoopBase, LoopMeta\nfrom quantaalpha.core.exception import FactorEmptyError\nfrom quantaalpha.factors.failure_tracker import (\n    FactorFailureTracker,\n    FailureReason,\n    DebugRoundSummary,\n)\nimport threading\n\n\nimport datetime\nimport pickle\nfrom collections import defaultdict\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Callable\n\nfrom tqdm.auto import tqdm\n\nfrom quantaalpha.core.exception import CoderError\nfrom quantaalpha.log import logger\nfrom functools import wraps\n\n# Decorator: check stop_event before invoking the function\n\n\ndef stop_event_check(func):\n    @wraps(func)\n    def wrapper(self, *args, **kwargs):\n        if STOP_EVENT is not None and STOP_EVENT.is_set():\n            raise Exception(\"Operation stopped due to stop_event flag.\")\n        return func(self, *args, **kwargs)\n\n    return wrapper\n\n\nclass AlphaAgentLoop(LoopBase, metaclass=LoopMeta):\n    skip_loop_error = (FactorEmptyError,)\n\n    @measure_time\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        PROP_SETTING: BaseFacSetting,\n        potential_direction,\n        stop_event: threading.Event,\n        use_local: bool = True,\n        strategy_suffix: str = \"\",\n        evolution_phase: str = \"original\",\n        trajectory_id: str = \"\",\n        parent_trajectory_ids: list = None,\n        direction_id: int = 0,\n        round_idx: int = 0,\n        quality_gate_config: dict = None,\n    ):\n        with logger.tag(\"init\"):\n            self.use_local = use_local\n            # Store initial direction for factor provenance\n            self.potential_direction = potential_direction\n\n            # Evolution-related attributes\n            self.strategy_suffix = strategy_suffix\n            self.evolution_phase = evolution_phase  # original / mutation / crossover\n            self.trajectory_id = trajectory_id\n            self.parent_trajectory_ids = parent_trajectory_ids or []\n            self.direction_id = direction_id\n            self.round_idx = round_idx  # 0=original, 1=mutation, 2=crossover, ...\n\n            # Quality gate config\n            self.quality_gate_config = quality_gate_config or {}\n\n            # For trajectory collection\n            self._last_hypothesis = None\n            self._last_experiment = None\n            self._last_feedback = None\n\n            # Failure tracking for debug rounds\n            self._failure_tracker = FactorFailureTracker(\n                max_debug_rounds=10\n            )  # Default 10 rounds\n            self._current_round_factors = []\n\n            logger.info(\n                f\"Initialized AlphaAgentLoop, backtest in {'local' if use_local else 'Docker'}\"\n            )\n            if potential_direction:\n                logger.info(f\"Initial direction: {potential_direction}\")\n            if evolution_phase != \"original\":\n                logger.info(\n                    f\"Evolution phase: {evolution_phase}, round: {round_idx}, trajectory_id: {trajectory_id}\"\n                )\n\n            consistency_enabled = self.quality_gate_config.get(\n                \"consistency_enabled\", False\n            )\n            complexity_enabled = self.quality_gate_config.get(\n                \"complexity_enabled\", True\n            )\n            redundancy_enabled = self.quality_gate_config.get(\n                \"redundancy_enabled\", True\n            )\n            logger.info(\n                f\"Quality gate: consistency={'on' if consistency_enabled else 'off'}, \"\n                f\"complexity={'on' if complexity_enabled else 'off'}, \"\n                f\"redundancy={'on' if redundancy_enabled else 'off'}\"\n            )\n\n            scen: Scenario = import_class(PROP_SETTING.scen)(use_local=use_local)\n            logger.log_object(scen, tag=\"scenario\")\n\n            # If strategy suffix is set, append it to the direction\n            effective_direction = potential_direction\n            if strategy_suffix:\n                effective_direction = (\n                    (potential_direction or \"\") + \"\\n\" + strategy_suffix\n                )\n\n            self.hypothesis_generator: HypothesisGen = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.hypothesis_gen\n            )(scen, effective_direction)\n            logger.log_object(self.hypothesis_generator, tag=\"hypothesis generator\")\n\n            # Pass consistency check config into factor constructor\n            self.factor_constructor: Hypothesis2Experiment = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.hypothesis2experiment\n            )(consistency_enabled=consistency_enabled)\n            logger.log_object(self.factor_constructor, tag=\"experiment generation\")\n\n            self.coder: Developer = import_class(PROP_SETTING.coder)(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.coder, tag=\"coder\")\n\n            self.runner: Developer = import_class(PROP_SETTING.runner)(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.runner, tag=\"runner\")\n\n            self.summarizer: HypothesisExperiment2Feedback = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.summarizer\n            )(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.summarizer, tag=\"summarizer\")\n            self.trace = Trace(scen=scen)\n\n            global STOP_EVENT\n            STOP_EVENT = stop_event\n            super().__init__()\n\n    @classmethod\n    def load(cls, path, use_local: bool = True):\n        \"\"\"Load existing session.\"\"\"\n        instance = super().load(path)\n        instance.use_local = use_local\n        logger.info(\n            f\"Loaded AlphaAgentLoop, backtest in {'local' if use_local else 'Docker'}\"\n        )\n        return instance\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def factor_propose(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Propose hypothesis as the basis for factor construction.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            idea = self.hypothesis_generator.gen(self.trace)\n            logger.log_object(idea, tag=\"hypothesis generation\")\n            self._last_hypothesis = idea\n        return idea\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def factor_construct(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Construct multiple factors from the hypothesis.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            factor = self.factor_constructor.convert(\n                prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], self.trace\n            )\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_tasks, tag=\"experiment generation\")\n\n            # Register factors for failure tracking\n            self._register_factors_from_experiment(factor)\n\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def factor_calculate(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Compute factor values from factor expressions.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"d\"):  # develop\n            factor = self.coder.develop(prev_out[\"factor_construct\"])\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_workspace_list, tag=\"coder result\")\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def factor_backtest(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Run backtest for factors.\"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"ef\"):  # evaluate and feedback\n            logger.info(f\"Start factor backtest (Local: {self.use_local})\")\n            exp = self.runner.develop(\n                prev_out[\"factor_calculate\"], use_local=self.use_local\n            )\n            if exp is None:\n                logger.error(f\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n                raise FactorEmptyError(\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n            logger.log_object(exp, tag=\"runner result\")\n            self._last_experiment = exp\n        return exp\n\n    @measure_time\n    @stop_event_check\n    def feedback(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        feedback = self.summarizer.generate_feedback(\n            prev_out[\"factor_backtest\"], prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], self.trace\n        )\n        with logger.tag(\"ef\"):  # evaluate and feedback\n            logger.log_object(feedback, tag=\"feedback\")\n        self.trace.hist.append(\n            (prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], prev_out[\"factor_backtest\"], feedback)\n        )\n\n        self._last_feedback = feedback\n\n        # Auto-save factors to unified factor library\n        try:\n            import os\n            from pathlib import Path\n            from quantaalpha.factors.library import FactorLibraryManager\n\n            # Project root: loop.py -> pipeline/ -> quantaalpha/ -> project_root/\n            project_root = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent\n\n            experiment_id = \"unknown\"\n            if hasattr(self, \"session_folder\") and self.session_folder:\n                parts = Path(self.session_folder).parts\n                for part in parts:\n                    if part.startswith(\"202\") and len(part) > 10:\n                        experiment_id = part\n                        break\n\n            round_number = self.round_idx\n\n            hypothesis_text = None\n            if prev_out.get(\"factor_propose\"):\n                hypothesis_text = str(prev_out[\"factor_propose\"])\n\n            planning_direction = getattr(self, \"potential_direction\", None)\n            user_initial_direction = getattr(self, \"user_initial_direction\", None)\n\n            evolution_phase = getattr(self, \"evolution_phase\", \"original\")\n            trajectory_id = getattr(self, \"trajectory_id\", \"\")\n            parent_trajectory_ids = getattr(self, \"parent_trajectory_ids\", [])\n\n            # Factor library filename can be customized via env FACTOR_LIBRARY_SUFFIX\n            library_suffix = os.environ.get(\"FACTOR_LIBRARY_SUFFIX\", \"\")\n            if library_suffix:\n                library_filename = f\"all_factors_library_{library_suffix}.json\"\n            else:\n                library_filename = \"all_factors_library.json\"\n            factorlib_dir = project_root / \"data\" / \"factorlib\"\n            factorlib_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n            library_path = factorlib_dir / library_filename\n            manager = FactorLibraryManager(str(library_path))\n            manager.add_factors_from_experiment(\n                experiment=prev_out[\"factor_backtest\"],\n                experiment_id=experiment_id,\n                round_number=round_number,\n                hypothesis=hypothesis_text,\n                feedback=feedback,\n                initial_direction=planning_direction,\n                user_initial_direction=user_initial_direction,\n                planning_direction=planning_direction,\n                evolution_phase=evolution_phase,\n                trajectory_id=trajectory_id,\n                parent_trajectory_ids=parent_trajectory_ids,\n            )\n            logger.info(\n                f\"Saved factors to library: {library_path} (phase={evolution_phase})\"\n            )\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.warning(f\"Failed to save factors to library: {e}\")\n\n    def _generate_factor_id(self, name: str, expr: str) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Generate a unique factor ID from name and expression.\n        \"\"\"\n        import hashlib\n\n        return hashlib.md5(f\"{name}_{expr}\".encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\n\n    def _register_factors_from_experiment(self, experiment) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Register all factors from experiment into failure tracker.\n        Returns list of factor IDs registered.\n        \"\"\"\n        factor_ids = []\n        for task in experiment.sub_tasks:\n            factor_id = self._generate_factor_id(\n                task.factor_name, task.factor_expression\n            )\n            self._failure_tracker.register_factor(\n                factor_id=factor_id,\n                factor_name=task.factor_name,\n                factor_expression=task.factor_expression,\n            )\n            factor_ids.append(factor_id)\n        self._current_round_factors = factor_ids\n        logger.info(f\"Registered {len(factor_ids)} factors for tracking\")\n        return factor_ids\n\n    def _track_coder_result(self, experiment) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Track coder results for all factors in current round.\n        \"\"\"\n        for i, task in enumerate(experiment.sub_tasks):\n            factor_id = self._current_round_factors[i]\n            workspace = (\n                experiment.sub_workspace_list[i]\n                if i < len(experiment.sub_workspace_list)\n                else None\n            )\n            if workspace is not None:\n                self._failure_tracker.mark_coder_success(factor_id)\n            else:\n                self._failure_tracker.mark_coder_failure(\n                    factor_id,\n                    reason=FailureReason.CODER_NO_WORKSPACE,\n                    detail=\"No workspace produced by coder\",\n                )\n\n    def _track_backtest_result(self, experiment) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Track backtest results for all factors in current round.\n        \"\"\"\n        if not hasattr(experiment, \"sub_results\") or not experiment.sub_results:\n            # No results - mark all as failed\n            for factor_id in self._current_round_factors:\n                self._failure_tracker.mark_backtest_failure(\n                    factor_id,\n                    reason=FailureReason.BACKTEST_EMPTY_RESULT,\n                    detail=\"No backtest results produced\",\n                )\n            return\n\n        # Track results for each factor\n        for i, task in enumerate(experiment.sub_tasks):\n            factor_id = self._current_round_factors[i]\n            factor_name = task.factor_name\n\n            if factor_name in experiment.sub_results:\n                result = experiment.sub_results[factor_name]\n                self._failure_tracker.mark_backtest_success(factor_id, result=result)\n            else:\n                self._failure_tracker.mark_backtest_failure(\n                    factor_id,\n                    reason=FailureReason.BACKTEST_EMPTY_RESULT,\n                    detail=f\"No backtest result for factor {factor_name}\",\n                )\n\n    def _finalize_debug_round(self) -> DebugRoundSummary:\n        \"\"\"\n        Finalize current debug round and return summary.\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._failure_tracker.finalize_round()\n\n    def get_successful_factor_ids(self) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"Get list of successful factor IDs.\"\"\"\n        return self._failure_tracker.successful_factor_ids\n\n    def get_failed_factor_ids(self) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"Get list of failed factor IDs.\"\"\"\n        return self._failure_tracker.failed_factor_ids\n\n    def get_factors_for_retry(self) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"Get factors that should be retried in next round.\"\"\"\n        return self._failure_tracker.get_factors_for_retry()\n\n    def should_continue_debug(self) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Check if debug should continue to next round.\"\"\"\n        return self._failure_tracker.should_continue_debug()\n\n    def _get_trajectory_data(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Get trajectory data for the current round (used by evolution controller).\n        Method name is prefixed with underscore so the workflow system does not treat it as a step.\n        Returns:\n            Dict with hypothesis, experiment, feedback, etc.\n        \"\"\"\n        return {\n            \"hypothesis\": self._last_hypothesis,\n            \"experiment\": self._last_experiment,\n            \"feedback\": self._last_feedback,\n            \"direction_id\": self.direction_id,\n            \"evolution_phase\": self.evolution_phase,\n            \"trajectory_id\": self.trajectory_id,\n            \"parent_trajectory_ids\": self.parent_trajectory_ids,\n            \"loop_idx\": self.loop_idx,\n            \"round_idx\": self.round_idx,\n        }\n\n\nclass BacktestLoop(LoopBase, metaclass=LoopMeta):\n    skip_loop_error = (FactorEmptyError,)\n\n    @measure_time\n    def __init__(self, PROP_SETTING: BaseFacSetting, factor_path=None):\n        with logger.tag(\"init\"):\n            self.factor_path = factor_path\n\n            scen: Scenario = import_class(PROP_SETTING.scen)()\n            logger.log_object(scen, tag=\"scenario\")\n\n            self.hypothesis_generator: HypothesisGen = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.hypothesis_gen\n            )(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.hypothesis_generator, tag=\"hypothesis generator\")\n\n            self.factor_constructor: Hypothesis2Experiment = import_class(\n                PROP_SETTING.hypothesis2experiment\n            )(factor_path=factor_path)\n            logger.log_object(self.factor_constructor, tag=\"experiment generation\")\n\n            self.coder: Developer = import_class(PROP_SETTING.coder)(\n                scen,\n                with_feedback=False,\n                with_knowledge=False,\n                knowledge_self_gen=False,\n            )\n            logger.log_object(self.coder, tag=\"coder\")\n\n            self.runner: Developer = PROP_SETTING.summarizer\n            )(scen)\n            logger.log_object(self.summarizer, tag=\"summarizer\")\n            self.trace = Trace(scen=scen)\n            super().__init__()\n\n    def factor_propose(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Market hypothesis on which factors are built\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            idea = self.hypothesis_generator.gen(self.trace)\n            logger.log_object(idea, tag=\"hypothesis generation\")\n        return idea\n\n    @measure_time\n    def factor_construct(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Construct a variety of factors that depend on the hypothesis\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"r\"):\n            factor = self.factor_constructor.convert(\n                prev_out[\"factor_propose\"], self.trace\n            )\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_tasks, tag=\"experiment generation\")\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    def factor_calculate(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Debug factors and calculate their values\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"d\"):  # develop\n            factor = self.coder.develop(prev_out[\"factor_construct\"])\n            logger.log_object(factor.sub_workspace_list, tag=\"coder result\")\n        return factor\n\n    @measure_time\n    def factor_backtest(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Conduct Backtesting\n        \"\"\"\n        with logger.tag(\"ef\"):  # evaluate and feedback\n            exp = self.runner.develop(prev_out[\"factor_calculate\"])\n            if exp is None:\n                logger.error(f\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n                raise FactorEmptyError(\"Factor extraction failed.\")\n            logger.log_object(exp, tag=\"runner result\")\n        return exp\n\n    @measure_time\n    def stop(self, prev_out: dict[str, Any]):\n
